task.title: Installing the Plugin
task.shortdesc: This task walks you through installing and configuring the DITA-to-Google-Docs plugin.

prereq.p: Before you begin, ensure you have the following:

ul.li: A Google Cloud project with the Docs API enabled

context.p: The plugin converts DITA XML content into a formatted Google Doc. It supports a wide range of DITA elements and authenticates automatically using your existing gcloud session.

choices.choice: Run ./gradlew bundlePlugin on Linux or macOS

step.cmd: Install the plugin into your DITA-OT instance.

substep.cmd: Navigate to the DITA-OT installation directory.

chrow.chdesc: Local development with an existing gcloud session

step.info: Use the standard dita command with the googledoc format.

result.p: A new Google Doc is created containing your formatted DITA content. The document URL is printed to the console.

postreq.p: After installation, verify the plugin is working by running the sample transformation:
